defaults.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 8.6 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM PTX from all 24 generated tcgen05 MMA probes
stages.detail: libNVVM emitted all 24 decorated generated probes: 28,730 PTX bytes, sorted SHA-256 manifest 016235453738d6088a2997bd5794c956523cb6a855ea034580f3e36d877555dc. Every manifest in this fixture hashes lexically sorted sha256sum entries keyed by artifact basename. Decoration added only the required datalayout, NVVM version, and kernel metadata. All 14 forms, five new aliases, and five preserved aliases were retained. A separate direct i8 oracle passed this target. Runtime was not executed.
stages.tool_version: CUDA toolkit 13.3; libNVVM 2.0; NVVM IR 2.0; debug IR 3.2; release V13.3.33

stages.representation: retained libNVVM LTO kernels for all 24 generated probes
stages.detail: The 24 LTO files total 65,524 bytes, manifest b8f0d03701daa2db7b85bb8aa80da1e5dcaa0a390fe0cc5b111772dfc8e1c966. Each probe adds @llvm.used because kernel annotations alone can let nvJitLink report success while emitting an empty cubin. nvJitLink produced 24 retained cubins totaling 139,264 bytes, manifest f9b4c5190710e7ddc6ee1bfdde95e836890f9fbdee6572d74e56490ee52b18ca. nvdisasm produced 24 listings totaling 236,975 bytes, manifest 4899e7ae06e24d4a9e84fdc4c8d8efc7151ce7b09e7db45ca3e3d4d758a2a3b4, and confirmed every kernel section and MMA instruction.

stages.representation: retained libNVVM LTO kernels for all 24 generated probes
stages.detail: The 24 retained LTO files total 65,428 bytes, manifest 2344903464dd8ef6db550f4c8d8228fbc1464a8f670c7f4a6d53f6e897cf1565. nvJitLink produced 24 cubins totaling 139,264 bytes, manifest 36f9e29835b560c30a73926a0f5dfd07365062917e5776adabbc9b83bd5fe0aa. nvdisasm produced 24 listings totaling 235,823 bytes, manifest 9f17872a1c4f394bdd0f0c872dfbdb510b850c26d250d904c9b82f810050b55d, and confirmed every kernel section and MMA instruction. A separate retained i8 oracle reached nvJitLink and was rejected as required. @llvm.used is required to prevent false-success empty cubins.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM target-spelling negative matrix
stages.detail: compute_101a and compute_101f both returned NVVM_ERROR_INVALID_OPTION. CUDA 13.3 does not expose these target spellings. Runtime was not executed.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 ptxas architecture exclusion matrix
stages.detail: Representative retained f16 and i8 probes were rejected on sm_120a and sm_120f, confirming that this tcgen05 MMA family is not admitted on those targets.

stages.representation: retained libNVVM LTO architecture exclusion matrix
stages.detail: Retained f16 and i8 LTO probes reached nvJitLink and were rejected during PTX compilation on sm_120a and sm_120f. @llvm.used ensured these were real terminal failures rather than empty-cubin false successes.
